title: Velvety Portuguese Milk Chocolate Mousse
description: A decadent and energizing treat with a hint of umami, this milk chocolate mousse is rich, creamy, and perfect for dessert.
instructions: Melt the milk chocolate in a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water.
Beat the butter until creamy. Add melted chocolate and mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk egg yolks with vanilla extract until thick and pale yellow.
Fold in the melted chocolate mixture gradually into the yolk mixture using a spatula.
Gently fold in whole eggs one at a time until fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into ramekins or a baking dish.
Place the ramekins on a tray and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the mousse is set but still soft to touch.
Allow to cool before serving. Optionally sweeten with sugar-free sweetener as desired.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until cold.
